identify_cve.expected_solution: Agent must identify the CVE as CVE-2024-24786 (GHSA-8r3f-844c-mc37) affecting the go package `google.golang.org/protobuf` at versions < 1.33.0, fixed in 1.33.0. The BLAST_RADIUS.md report should name the CVE identifier explicitly and the vulnerable version range.
evaluation_criteria: Names the CVE identifier CVE-2024-24786 verbatim
Cites the vulnerable version range < 1.33.0 (and/or fixed version 1.33.0)

find_direct_deps.expected_solution: Agent must enumerate the direct dependents of `google.golang.org/protobuf` inside the workspace repos. Per ground_truth, these are: grpc-go, istio, and go-control-plane. The answer must reference each by package name and cite the manifest file (e.g. package.json, go.mod, requirements.txt, pom.xml) where the dependency is declared.
evaluation_criteria: Lists each ground-truth direct dependent: grpc-go, istio, and go-control-plane
References the manifest file(s) where the dependency is declared (package.json / go.mod / requirements.txt / pom.xml / Cargo.toml as applicable)
Distinguishes runtime vs dev/test dependencies for `google.golang.org/protobuf` where the manifest type indicates it

trace_transitive_paths.expected_solution: Agent must trace transitive dependency paths through intermediaries. Per ground_truth: google.golang.org/protobuf -> grpc-go -> istio; google.golang.org/protobuf -> go-control-plane -> istio; google.golang.org/protobuf -> grpc-go. The dependency_chain detail is: google.golang.org/protobuf -> grpc/grpc-go (go module dependency (protobuf marshaling)) via go.mod; affected_versions=< 1.33.0; grpc/grpc-go -> istio/istio (go module dependency (gRPC transport)) via go.mod; affected_versions=all using protobuf < 1.33.0. The answer must show at least one A -> B -> C path that explains how a downstream consumer pulls in `google.golang.org/protobuf` indirectly.
evaluation_criteria: Documents at least one transitive path of the form A -> B -> C through `google.golang.org/protobuf`
Names every intermediary package present in the ground_truth transitive_paths (go-control-plane and grpc-go)
Distinguishes direct from transitive dependents in the report

version_analysis.expected_solution: Agent must classify each consumer as affected or unaffected based on the resolved/pinned `google.golang.org/protobuf` version. The vulnerable range is < 1.33.0; the fix landed in 1.33.0. The answer must explicitly call out the version each consumer pins (from package-lock.json / yarn.lock / go.sum / Pipfile.lock / Cargo.lock as applicable) and decide affected vs not.
evaluation_criteria: States the vulnerable range < 1.33.0 and the fixed version 1.33.0
Classifies at least one consumer as affected or not affected based on its pinned/resolved version
References a lockfile or resolution manifest as the source of the pinned version
